creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Examples:
* audio/opustags: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy18/data/main-amd64-default/p645a502a4f60_s8b2e7da7085/logs/opustags-1.10.1.log
* www/dpp: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy18/data/main-amd64-default/p645a502a4f60_s8b2e7da7085/logs/dpp-discord-10.0.29_1.log
* misc/ola: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy18/data/main-amd64-default/p645a502a4f60_s8b2e7da7085/logs/ola-0.10.9_7.log

There are many other examples.

Many C++ ports that were successful started to fail recently with various other C++ errors that didn't happen before.
The amount of fallout increased significantly.

Perhaps there problems in C++ libraries or compiler?
